evals.name: linear-restraint
evals.rationale: Linear's landing page is a textbook example of restraint — dark mode default, near-monochrome with one yellow accent across the whole page, single sans + single mono family, real product components as marketing illustration.

assertions.text: Each taste principle has trigger/decision/reason/evidence fields
{domain}.md does not use banned slop phrases (clean/modern/sleek/seamless/intuitive/user-friendly/visually appealing as positive)
At least one taste principle is a restraint trade-off (mentions 'over', 'instead', 'rather than', 'no [feature]', 'never', 'refused')
Output mentions specific px/hex/ratio values (not just generic descriptions)
Output references THIS site's actual signals (e.g. Linear → Inter/dark; Are.na → grid/editorial; Stripe → tinted/sohne)

evals.name: arena-editorial
evals.rationale: Are.na is editorial/utilitarian — light background, near-zero decoration, content-as-design philosophy, no card shadows, no accent color overlay.

assertions.text: Each taste principle has trigger/decision/reason/evidence fields
{domain}.md does not use banned slop phrases
At least one taste principle is a restraint trade-off
Output references are.na's actual signals (areal font, grid layout, block-based content, near-zero decoration)

evals.name: stripe-craft
evals.rationale: Stripe is craft-heavy — tinted neutrals, multi-layer shadows, careful illustration system, restrained accent color, generous spacing.

assertions.text: Each taste principle has trigger/decision/reason/evidence fields
{domain}.md does not use banned slop phrases
At least one taste principle is a restraint trade-off
Output references Stripe's actual signals (sohne font, gradients, tinted neutrals, careful spacing)
